notes: Minimal inference-only extraction. model/ mirrors the raw plannn3 package with imports rewritten to the local model.* namespace; model_config.json mirrors trace_model/config.json with model.* type strings and training losses removed. NFS asset paths (dinov3 checkpoint, PCA and history-trajectory tokenisers) are referenced inside model_config.json. Weights and golden pickles stay on NFS and are never committed.
